channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google Faces Antitrust Lawsuit Over Ad Tech, Potential Breakup Looms
item.description: Google's advertising technology is under scrutiny by the Justice Department and a coalition of states, which claim the company has a monopoly over online ad tech. The case could result in Google being forced to break up its ad tech business.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Passport Photo Pitfalls: The Unlikely Consequences of Looking "Hot" in Your Travel ID
item.description: A growing trend on TikTok showcases people going all out with glam looks just to take their passport photos, but experts warn that this approach can lead to frustrating and even missed flights.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
